meaning: adj.燃烧的,热烈的,色彩鲜明的,熊熊的,灼热的,火红的,惊人的
examples: Flaming fragments were still falling from the sky.
Flaming torches were positioned at intervals along the terrace.
Other ancient civilisations certainly knew about kites; as early as 1250 BC, the Chinese were using them to deliver messages and dump flaming debris on their foes.
Hoping to allay parental fears, Frito-Lay has now introduced the slightly healthier baked Flaming Hot Cheetos.
And Flaming Hot Cheetos are definitely their rising star, especially in places like Texas and California.
